ingredients.item: ¼ cup (10 g) fresh mint leaves
ingredients.original: ¼ cup (10 g) fresh mint leaves

ingredients.item: ¼ cup (30 g) shredded Parmesan cheese
ingredients.original: ¼ cup (30 g) shredded Parmesan cheese

ingredients.item: 1 In a large bowl, massage the arugula with the oil.
ingredients.original: 1 In a large bowl, massage the arugula with the oil.

ingredients.item: 2 Add the mint leaves, pomegranate arils, Parmesan, and pistachios to the bowl. Drizzle with the pomegranate molasses and season with salt and pepper.
ingredients.original: 2 Add the mint leaves, pomegranate arils, Parmesan, and pistachios to the bowl. Drizzle with the pomegranate molasses and season with salt and pepper.

ingredients.item: 3 Toss to combine well and serve.
ingredients.original: 3 Toss to combine well and serve.

ingredients.item:
PASTA SALAD
8 ounces (225 g) pasta of choice (such as cavatelli, farfalle, or fusilli)
2 small Persian cucumbers, finely chopped
ingredients.original:

8 ounces (225 g) pasta of choice (such as cavatelli, farfalle, or fusilli)
2 small Persian cucumbers, finely chopped

ingredients.item: ½ cup (55 g) sliced black olives
ingredients.original: ½ cup (55 g) sliced black olives

ingredients.item: ½ cup (30 g) finely chopped green onions
ingredients.original: ½ cup (30 g) finely chopped green onions

ingredients.item: ½ cup (25 g) finely chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.original: ½ cup (25 g) finely chopped fresh parsley

ingredients.item: ½ cup (60 g) chopped sun-dried tomatoes
ingredients.original: ½ cup (60 g) chopped sun-dried tomatoes

ingredients.item:
DRESSING
¼ cup (60 ml) fresh lemon juice
2 tablespoons za’atar
